creator: peter@libassi.se
text:
Created attachment 239946
sysutils_pflogx patch

Attached patch fixes the compiler errors and warnings.

As far as i can tell pflogx now works on 13.1-RELEASE-p3 arm64 and amd64.

modified:   sysutils/pflogx/Makefile
modified:   sysutils/pflogx/files/patch-src_CmdLineParser.cpp
modified:   sysutils/pflogx/files/patch-src_LogEntryFormat.cpp

New files:
  (use "git add <file>..." to include in what will be committed)

sysutils/pflogx/files/patch-src_LogParser.cpp
sysutils/pflogx/files/patch-src_Makefile
